LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS NANCY MARTIN AND FRED MARTIN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO EL DORADO COUNTY IS GRANTED AS TO CHANGE OF VENUE AND DENIED AS TO FEES AND COSTS. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO EL DORADO COUNTY. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN THAT EL DORADO COUNTY WAS THEIR COUNTY OF RESIDENCE WHEN PLAINTIFFS COMMENCED THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO SHOW THAT THE LEASES WERE EXECUTED IN SAN FRANCISCO AND DEFENDANTS' OBJECTION TO THE LEASES AS NOT PROPERLY AUTHENTICATED IS SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF HAD A GOOD FAITH BASIS TO FILE THE ACTION IN SAN FRANCISCO GIVEN THE ADDRESS OF DEFENDANTS' CONDOMINIUM. PER CUBIC, DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO HAVE THE CASE TRANSFERRED TO EL DORADO COUNTY. PLAINTIFFS CAN SEEK TO CHANGE VENUE TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY BY FILING A CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES MOTION IN EL DORADO COUNTY AFTER DEFENDANTS FILE AN ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.(302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brock R. Lyle, Esq., of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 650.780.1647, appearing for defendants and moving party.

No other Appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NANCY MARTIN AND FRED MARTIN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO EL DORADO COUNTY is Granted as to change of venue and denied as to fees and costs. The case is transferred to El Dorado County. Defendants have shown that El Dorado County was their county of residence when plaintiffs commenced this action. Plaintiffs fail to show that the leases were executed in San Francisco and defendants' objection to the leases as not properly authenticated is sustained. Plaintiff had a good faith basis to file the action in San Francisco given the address of defendants' condominium. Per Cubic, defendants are entitled to have the case transferred to El Dorado County. Plaintiffs can seek to change venue to Santa Clara County by filing a convenience of witnesses motion in El Dorado County after defendants file an answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
